name: Mini Chocolate Chip Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the cream cheese, egg, and sugar until well combined.
2. Add the mini chocolate chips to the mixture and stir until evenly distributed.
3. In another bowl, combine the flour, sugar, cocoa, vanilla, baking soda, water, and oil.
4. Mix the dry ingredients until just combined.
5. Pour small amounts of the cream cheese mixture into mini muffin cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for approximately 20 minutes, or until set.
7. Makes about 4 dozen.
